textByHash.0fb34acdb93f9723cea470b014e166aeb1c215ce: What are you talking about? It was definitely the Easter Bunny.
textByHash.18d33851716e6229b93ff1f2783dea9b4ee4b22a: Nobody has, and yet the streets are full of old carrots. We don't usually have such a problem with vegetable waste unless him and his lot have turned up.
textByHash.24b3487aee0f3f16f351990c1731ae2c8361201b: They're old and dirty, I don't want to eat those!
textByHash.2ae51f63b410faa66818ff3806d331cdec6bc397: Aye, proper suspicious if you ask me.
textByHash.323251fd5fad046d50a893850634ff171fe59b42: They best not end up in my lunch!
textByHash.610ae317cb831b0be855308d9c0413fc2d7da192: It was a bloody racket to be honest, and dangerous!
textByHash.6f059e55c9b111ca8a2ec35dcf1f82ae75fe8084: But I'd gladly stand on a rusty nail or take a plank to the face for one of them delicious chocolate eggs.
textByHash.6ff88234b1fbe0e1b6b3d3958b1dbc5ce78cac13: Mate, it took you so long to get me lunch the Easter Bunny showed up, I had some choccy eggs instead.
textByHash.9125d4d20d03a482a7ed0563986436d483972f1c: Oh lunch is it now eh? Can I have some?
textByHash.94dc635351541ecd3fdecba9f85ee8ff08a4f215: Wagons heaving with eggs being hauled up through the streets...
textByHash.a2e44ef052a1a54b15177db981e29ab4ef72d87b: It's not just Varrock mind, it's the woods to the south of here too!
textByHash.b3595730d555c04b9d6b61217f75325f858984f7: There's an egg-shaped hole in my life.
textByHash.c899325d43615cfe9eff60759e672dd824b5242e: Aye. It wasn't so bad when it was just the crates lying around, but someone's been in them and scattered carrots all over the place.
textByHash.e1b14639c15250d77dc63067643e3b9d41f32cc1: It's in the woods just south of here. Carrots all over the place too!
textByHash.ecdd8e2282f2d8d317435e62ec9811ebe9c9c420: Usually Varrock is full of Easter merriment by now...
textByHash.f0b42a9b836e6e152e08b8b82835e25d3dbbae62: Giant rabbits hopping about, building stalls and putting up decorations...
textByHash.f5c46e1b02b61fa61ef5d154725b2b612bf0879c: Fetch me lunch for me then eh, I'm right peckish!
